mapper.sql: SELECT c.合同编号 AS contractId, c.合同号 AS contractNo, CASE WHEN (SUM(CASE WHEN ci.报价模式 IN ('总价包干', 'PACKAGE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN ci.报价模式 IN ('按量结算', 'UNIT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0) THEN 'MIXED' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ci.报价模式 IN ('总价包干', 'PACKAGE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'PACKAGE' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ci.报价模式 IN ('按量结算', 'UNIT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'UNIT' ELSE 'PACKAGE' END AS pricingType FROM CONTRACT c LEFT JOIN CONTRACT_ITEM ci ON ci.合同编号 = c.合同编号 GROUP BY c.合同编号, c.合同号
mapper.select:
SELECT cp.pricingType AS pricingType, NULL AS dateLabel, SUM(s.结算金额) AS settlementAmount, NULL AS receivedAmount FROM SETTLEMENT s INNER JOIN (
) cp ON (s.合同编号 IS NOT NULL AND cp.contractId = s.合同编号) OR (s.合同编号 IS NULL AND cp.contractNo = s.合同号) WHERE s.结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE' AND s.状态 NOT IN ('草稿', '已驳回') AND DATE(s.创建时间) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY cp.pricingType

SELECT cp.pricingType AS pricingType, NULL AS dateLabel, NULL AS settlementAmount, SUM(rel.关联金额) AS receivedAmount FROM SETTLEMENT_INVOICE_REL rel INNER JOIN SETTLEMENT s ON s.结算单编号 = rel.结算单编号 INNER JOIN (
) cp ON (s.合同编号 IS NOT NULL AND cp.contractId = s.合同编号) OR (s.合同编号 IS NULL AND cp.contractNo = s.合同号) WHERE s.结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE' AND rel.status != 'CANCELLED' AND DATE(rel.关联时间) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY cp.pricingType

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(s.创建时间, '%Y-%m-%d')
DATE_FORMAT(s.创建时间, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(s.创建时间, '%Y-%m')
AS dateLabel, cp.pricingType AS pricingType, SUM(s.结算金额) AS settlementAmount, NULL AS receivedAmount FROM SETTLEMENT s INNER JOIN (
) cp ON (s.合同编号 IS NOT NULL AND cp.contractId = s.合同编号) OR (s.合同编号 IS NULL AND cp.contractNo = s.合同号) WHERE s.结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE' AND s.状态 NOT IN ('草稿', '已驳回') AND DATE(s.创建时间) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(s.创建时间) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY dateLabel, cp.pricingType ORDER BY dateLabel ASC

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(rel.关联时间, '%Y-%m-%d')
DATE_FORMAT(rel.关联时间, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(rel.关联时间, '%Y-%m')
AS dateLabel, cp.pricingType AS pricingType, NULL AS settlementAmount, SUM(rel.关联金额) AS receivedAmount FROM SETTLEMENT_INVOICE_REL rel INNER JOIN SETTLEMENT s ON s.结算单编号 = rel.结算单编号 INNER JOIN (
) cp ON (s.合同编号 IS NOT NULL AND cp.contractId = s.合同编号) OR (s.合同编号 IS NULL AND cp.contractNo = s.合同号) WHERE s.结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE' AND rel.status != 'CANCELLED' AND DATE(rel.关联时间) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(rel.关联时间) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY dateLabel, cp.pricingType ORDER BY dateLabel ASC
